svg.text: Spread, agreement, and the selector gap they forecast
290 agreement-scored rounds, all judges, formats, and pools; leave-one-condition-out
σ = SD of value scores within one prompt's pool, averaged over the round's prompts
ρ = per-prompt correlation of judge scores with value scores, averaged over the round
spread σ × agreement ρ = forecast ρσ — the horizontal axis below
observed selector gap g = kept mean − pool mean
